zh.Shipdham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可希達哈姆
zh.Shipdam,Norfolk,England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret於大約1505年出生在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆。她於1550年與Richard Flegg在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年10月在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆。

zh-hans.Shipdham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可希達哈姆
zh-hans.Shipdam,Norfolk,England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret于大约1505年出生在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆。她于1550年与Richard Flegg在英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年10月在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born about 1505, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England. She married Richard Flegg in 1550, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in October 1558, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Shipdham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret est née environ 1505, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Flegg en 1550, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret wurde um 1505 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat 1550 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Richard Flegg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1558 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Shipdham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret è nata il circa 1505 nel Shipdham, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Richard Flegg nel 1550, nel Shipdham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Shipdham, Norfolk, England.

ja.Shipdham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハム
ja.Shipdam,Norfolk,England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハム
ja.lifeSummary: Margaretは約1505年にイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで生まれた。1550年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムでRichard Fleggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年10月に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 대략 1505년 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 시p드함에서 Richard Flegg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 10월 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에 묻혔다.

mn.Shipdam,Norfolk,England: Shipdham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Flegg em 1550, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась около 1505 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Flegg в 1550 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1558 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret nació aproximadamente 1505, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Flegg en 1550, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
